The '''GBk-585 hyperdrive unit''' was a model of [[Hyperdrive motivator/Legends|hyperdrive motivator]] manufactured by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]]. The GBk-585 was used on Incom's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]], with motivators located in each [[Engine/Legends|engine]]. The motivators were wired together using a dual shielded circuit allowing them to fire simultaneously.<ref name="SWS" />
